query:
INSERT INTO `roaming_boss_catalog` (`boss_code`, `name`, `title`, `tier`, `wuxing`, `level`, `base_hp`, `base_attack`, `base_defense`, `base_speed`, `base_magic_attack`, `base_magic_defense`, `skills`, `drop_table`, `exp_multiplier`, `gold_multiplier`, `move_interval_sec`, `lifetime_minutes`, `stamina_cost`, `patrol_region`, `image_url`, `description`, `enrage_config`, `is_active`, `schedule_config`, `created_at`, `updated_at`) VALUES
('death_knight', '死亡騎士', '冥界統帥', 2, 'metal', 50, 25000, 200, 100, 28, 150, 80,
  '[{"id":"death_slash","name":"死亡斬擊","skillType":"physical","damageMultiplier":2.5,"mpCost":25,"wuxing":"metal","cooldown":2,"additionalEffect":{"type":"bleed","chance":0.4,"duration":3,"value":60}},{"id":"soul_drain","name":"靈魂吸取","skillType":"magic","damageMultiplier":1.8,"mpCost":30,"wuxing":"water","cooldown":3,"additionalEffect":{"type":"lifesteal","chance":0.8,"value":0.3}},{"id":"dark_aura","name":"死亡領域","skillType":"debuff","damageMultiplier":1.0,"mpCost":35,"wuxing":"metal","cooldown":5,"additionalEffect":{"type":"curse","chance":0.5,"duration":3,"value":20}}]',
  '[{"itemId":"death_blade","itemName":"死亡之刃","dropRate":0.15,"minQty":1,"maxQty":1},{"itemId":"soul_gem","itemName":"靈魂寶石","dropRate":0.25,"minQty":1,"maxQty":3},{"itemId":"knight_armor_shard","itemName":"騎士甲碎片","dropRate":0.3,"minQty":2,"maxQty":5}]',
  3.0, 3.0, 600, 30, 25,
  '["台北市","新北市","桃園市","新竹市","新竹縣","苗栗縣","台中市"]', NULL,
  '從冥界歸來的上古騎士，統帥亡靈軍團。每次出現都伴隨著死亡的氣息，是北部到中部的噩夢。',
  '{"hpThresholds":[{"hpPercent":50,"atkBoost":0.3,"spdBoost":0.15,"message":"死亡騎士舉起黑劍，亡靈之力湧入體內！"},{"hpPercent":25,"atkBoost":0.5,"spdBoost":0.3,"message":"死亡騎士進入冥界狂暴！黑暗能量爆發！"}]}',
  1, '{"type":"scheduled","cron":"0 0 12,20 * * *","duration":30,"maxInstances":1}', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),

('ruby', '露比', '紅蓮妖姬', 2, 'fire', 48, 20000, 160, 70, 35, 220, 90,
  '[{"id":"ruby_flame","name":"紅蓮業火","skillType":"magic","damageMultiplier":2.2,"mpCost":30,"wuxing":"fire","cooldown":2,"additionalEffect":{"type":"burn","chance":0.5,"duration":3,"value":80}},{"id":"charm","name":"魅惑之眼","skillType":"debuff","damageMultiplier":0.8,"mpCost":25,"wuxing":"fire","cooldown":4,"additionalEffect":{"type":"confusion","chance":0.45,"duration":2}},{"id":"fire_dance","name":"焰舞","skillType":"magic","damageMultiplier":1.5,"mpCost":20,"wuxing":"fire","cooldown":3,"additionalEffect":{"type":"burn","chance":0.35,"duration":2,"value":50}}]',
  '[{"itemId":"ruby_heart","itemName":"露比之心","dropRate":0.12,"minQty":1,"maxQty":1},{"itemId":"flame_silk","itemName":"火焰絲綢","dropRate":0.3,"minQty":1,"maxQty":3},{"itemId":"enchanted_gem","itemName":"魅惑寶石","dropRate":0.2,"minQty":1,"maxQty":2}]',
  3.0, 3.0, 600, 30, 25,
  '["台中市","彰化縣","南投縣","雲林縣","嘉義縣","嘉義市","台南市","高雄市"]', NULL,
  '以絕世美貌蠱惑人心的紅蓮妖姬，魔法攻擊極高。從中部到南部的旅人都對她聞風喪膽。',
  '{"hpThresholds":[{"hpPercent":50,"atkBoost":0.25,"spdBoost":0.2,"message":"露比的雙眼燃起紅蓮之火，魅惑之力增強！"},{"hpPercent":25,"atkBoost":0.45,"spdBoost":0.35,"message":"露比釋放紅蓮業火，整個戰場化為火海！"}]}',
  1, '{"type":"scheduled","cron":"0 0 10,18 * * *","duration":30,"maxInstances":1}', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute INSERT INTO `roaming_boss_catalog` (`boss_code`, `name`, `title`, `tier`, `wuxing`, `level`, `base_hp`, `base_attack`, `base_defense`, `base_speed`, `base_magic_attack`, `base_magic_defense`, `skills`, `drop_table`, `exp_multiplier`, `gold_multiplier`, `move_interval_sec`, `lifetime_minutes`, `stamina_cost`, `patrol_region`, `image_url`, `description`, `enrage_config`, `is_active`, `schedule_config`, `created_at`, `updated_at`) VALUES
